infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FixNG needs camera access to upload your profile photo and skill video.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FixNG needs photo library access to select your profile photo, ID, and skill video.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FixNG uses your location to connect you with nearby customers.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FixNG needs microphone access when recording your skill video.

plugins.photosPermission: FixNG needs access to your photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: FixNG needs access to your camera.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FixNG uses your location to connect you with nearby customers.
